configuration.name: Name
configuration.test_success: Connection successful. You can now add the device.
configuration.test_required: Test the connection before adding the device.
configuration.test_timeout: The connection test timed out. You can still add the device.
configuration.test_unresolved: The hostname could not be resolved by Homey. You can still add the device.
configuration.test_refused: The device responded, but the specified TCP port is closed. You can still add the device.
configuration.test_unreachable: The device is not reachable from Homey. You can still add the device.
configuration.test_failed: The connection test failed. You can still add the device.

configuration.port_hint: Enter the service port to monitor, from 1 to 65535.

configuration.ip_explanation: Watch a device at a specific IP address using ARP with a TCP fallback.

configuration.host_required: Enter an IP address or hostname.
